title: Nerfed Warden
description: This lowers the warden's damage making defeating the warden easier
body:
Warden no longer does 80 damage, now it does less damage so fighting it is actually possible!


Easy:10 damage ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ

Normal: 18 damage ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ

Hard: 26 damage ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ‚Ě§ÔłŹ

This is done by giving warden weakness 3
This way, warders can no longer 1 shot a geared player while still keeping it strong
